typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_viha_input_file_name as string (),
	var_viha_input_folder as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT	CAST(svtr.dss_lis_instance_id AS varchar(1)) + \'||\' + CAST (order_id AS varchar(20)) + \'||\' + ct.test_code AS test_row_id 		, CAST(svtr.dss_lis_instance_id AS varchar(1)) + \'||\' + CAST (order_id AS varchar(20)) AS order_item_row_id 		, 1 AS last_result_history_seq_nbr 		, CAST(svtr.dss_lis_instance_id AS varchar(1)) + \'||\' + CAST (order_id AS varchar(20)) + \'||\' + ct.test_code + \'||1\' AS result_history_row_id  		, person_id  		, ordering_provider_id 		, encounter_id  		, CONVERT(VARCHAR, collection_dt_tm, 23) AS collection_date  		, CONVERT(VARCHAR, collection_dt_tm, 8)  AS collection_time 		, CONVERT(VARCHAR, receive_dt_tm, 23)    AS receive_date  		, CONVERT(VARCHAR, receive_dt_tm, 8)     AS receive_time 		, CONVERT(VARCHAR, result_dt_tm, 23)     AS result_date  		, CONVERT(VARCHAR, result_dt_tm, 8)      AS result_time  		, package_cd  		, careset_order_id  		, coi.order_item_code  		, ct.test_code  		, accession_number  		, accession_id  		, container_id  		, clinical_event_id  		, event_id  		, svtr.dss_lis_instance_id  FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result svtr  INNER JOIN lab.cfg_code_viha_order_item coi ON svtr.order_item_cd = coi.viha_order_item_code AND svtr.dss_lis_instance_id = coi.dss_lis_instance_id  INNER JOIN lab.cfg_code_viha_test ct ON svtr.test_cd = ct.viha_test_code AND svtr.dss_lis_instance_id = ct.dss_lis_instance_id',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		test_row_id as string,
		result_history_row_id as string,
		collection_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		accession_id as integer,
		order_item_row_id as string,
		last_result_history_seq_nbr as short,
		result_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		package_cd as integer,
		receive_time as string,
		dss_lis_instance_id as long,
		receive_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		accession_number as string,
		event_id as integer,
		result_time as string,
		order_item_code as string,
		test_code as string,
		collection_time as string,
		encounter_id as integer,
		careset_order_id as integer,
		container_id as integer,
		clinical_event_id as integer,
		person_id as integer,
		ordering_provider_id as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		test_row_id,
		result_history_row_id,
		collection_date,
		accession_id,
		order_item_row_id,
		last_result_history_seq_nbr,
		result_date,
		package_cd,
		receive_time,
		dss_lis_instance_id,
		receive_date,
		accession_number,
		event_id,
		result_time,
		order_item_code,
		test_code,
		collection_time,
		encounter_id,
		careset_order_id,
		container_id,
		clinical_event_id,
		person_id,
		ordering_provider_id)) ~> OLEDBDestination
